variants.name: UNO Classic
variants.rules:
Match cards by color or number.

• Skip — next player loses a turn
• Reverse — reverses play direction
• Draw Two (+2) — next player draws 2
• Wild — choose the next color
• Wild Draw Four (+4) — choose color, next player draws 4

Say UNO! with one card left. First to empty their hand wins.

variants.name: UNO All Wild!
variants.tagline: Every card is a Wild card
variants.rules:
In All Wild, every card is a Wild!

• No number matching — play any card on your turn
• Wild — choose the next color
• Wild Draw Two — choose color, next player draws 2
• Wild Draw Four — choose color, next player draws 4
• Wild Targeted Draw Two — choose a player to draw 2
• Wild Reverse — reverses direction
• Wild Skip — skip the next player

Fast-paced chaos. First to empty their hand wins.

variants.name: UNO Golf
variants.rules:
Golf-themed UNO with classic rules plus scoring.

• Play classic UNO rules across 9 rounds (holes)
• Number cards = face value points in hand at end of round
• Draw Two = 20 points, Skip/Reverse = 20 points
• Wild = 50 points, Wild Draw Four = 50 points

Lowest total score after 9 holes wins the match.

variants.name: UNO Dare!
variants.rules:
Classic UNO with Dare cards mixed in.

• Dare cards replace some action cards
• When you play a Dare card, the next player must complete the dare or draw 2 cards
• House dares are shown on screen when a Dare is played
• Standard Wild and +4 rules still apply

First to empty their hand wins.

variants.name: UNO Flex!
variants.tagline: Flex cards let you change the rules
variants.rules:
Flex cards add a twist to every hand.

• Flex Wild — play as any color AND any number
• Standard action cards included
• When you play a Flex card, you may change the active color freely
• Draw stacking is not allowed

Outsmart opponents with flexible plays. First to empty their hand wins.

variants.name: UNO Show 'em No Mercy
variants.rules:
The ruthless version of UNO.

• Draw card stacking is allowed — stack +2 on +2 and +4 on +4
• 7-0 Rule: playing a 7 lets you swap hands with any player; playing a 0 rotates all hands
• If you can't play, draw until you can
• Skip and Reverse work as normal

First to empty their hand wins. No mercy.

variants.name: UNO Toy Story 4
variants.rules:
Toy Story 4 themed UNO with classic rules.

• Character-themed card art
• Duke Caboom Wild Ride — special wild card
• Standard Skip, Reverse, +2, Wild, +4 rules
• Say UNO! when one card remains

First player to play all cards wins.

variants.name: UNO X Games
variants.rules:
Limited edition X Games UNO with classic gameplay.

• Extreme sports themed card designs
• Standard UNO rules apply
• Action cards: Skip, Reverse, +2, Wild, +4
• 30 seconds per turn

First to empty their hand wins.
